_README: Copy this to config.json and make it yours. Every user-specific knob lives here so you never edit the code. show_name + audience + host_persona drive what the episode is about; the rest only matters once you turn delivery on.
host_persona: a sharp curator of new AI-coding tools and agentic workflows
audience: AI builders, developers, and startup founders who want tools they can install today
_delivery_README: none = build the .m4a and stop (default, zero setup). resend = also upload + email subscribers (needs Supabase + Resend, see README).
